FORM.SCRIPT: local slf = UISelf ODS("GetCurrentResolutionWidth : "..GetCurrentResolutionWidth().."\n", false, 1509) slf:SetSize(Point2(GetCurrentResolutionWidth(), GetCurrentResolutionHeight())) slf:SetImgSize(Point2(GetCurrentResolutionWidth()+1, GetCurrentResolutionHeight()+1)) slf:SetLocation(Point2(0,0))

ActivateUI("FRM_BACKGROUND")
if LOCALE.NC_KOREA == GetLocale() then CallUI("FRM_NOTICE_MARK") end

local kWnd = UISelf local kScreenSize = GetScreenSize() local kPos = kWnd:GetLocation() kPos:SetX( (kScreenSize:GetX() - kWnd:GetSize():GetX() ) / 2 ) kPos:SetY( (kScreenSize:GetY() - kWnd:GetSize():GetY() ) / 2 ) kWnd:SetLocation( kPos )

local Menu = false if( CheckNil(g_world == nil) ) then return false end if( CheckNil(g_world:IsNil()) ) then return false end
if Menu == false then UnLockPlayerInputMove(3) if g_world:GetMapNo() ~= 9910100 then UnLockPlayerInput(1) end UnLockPlayerInput(3) UnLockPlayerInput(6) UnLockPlayerInput(7) UnLockPlayerInput(8) g_bEnableShortCutKey = true end
